title: Toot Toot Train
subtitle: 水水和小伙伴们一起搭小火车去远方
theme: 朋友同行、分享旅程、等待慢一点的伙伴
moral: 快乐的路上，有朋友一起更开心；看见慢一点的伙伴，停一停、帮一把。

pages.narration: 清晨的阳光照在小站台。彩色小火车停在站台边，水水开心地等呀等。
pages.composition_hint: a high-angle wide view of a warm cozy little train platform with a station sign and morning golden sunlight, shuishui as a white rabbit in a pink dress, pink sneakers, and pink floral headband waiting happily beside a cute colorful small steam train with a round friendly engine and open pastel passenger carriages, a friendly cartoon GREEN CROCODILE train driver with a gentle smiling face, small rounded teeth, a train conductor cap, and striped overalls sitting in the engine

pages.narration: 小熊带着蜂蜜来，看到鳄鱼先生摆摆手。
pages.composition_hint: an eye-level medium view of a small brown BEAR CUB in a yellow vest hugging a honey jar while walking toward the train, a friendly cartoon GREEN CROCODILE train driver in the engine waving one hand, shuishui in a pink dress smiling from an open pastel carriage, all faces clearly visible

pages.narration: 可爱的小兔，蹦蹦又跳跳，胡萝卜装满小背包。

dialogue.speaker: grey_bunny
dialogue.text: 鳄鱼先生，能搭火车吗？我要去外婆家瞧一瞧。

pages.composition_hint: a three-quarter front medium view of a small GREY bunny wearing blue overalls, carrying a little backpack stuffed with orange carrots, hopping toward an open pastel train carriage, shuishui as a white rabbit in a pink dress reaching a welcoming hand from the carriage, a friendly cartoon GREEN CROCODILE train driver smiling in the round engine

pages.narration: 鳄鱼先生开火车，嘟嘟嘟嘟嘟嘟嘟！小火车慢慢开动啦。
pages.composition_hint: an eye-level wide view of the cute colorful small steam train starting to roll away from the warm station platform, a friendly cartoon GREEN CROCODILE train driver driving the round engine, shuishui in a pink dress, a small brown BEAR CUB with a honey jar, and a small GREY bunny in blue overalls sitting in open pastel carriages and singing with happy faces

pages.narration: 穿过森林，穿过山洞，勇敢向前冲！

dialogue.speaker: shuishui
dialogue.text: 山洞黑黑的，我也很勇敢！

pages.composition_hint: a low-angle wide view looking up slightly as the colorful small steam train enters a rounded tunnel in a green forest, the round engine light glowing, a friendly cartoon GREEN CROCODILE train driver holding the controls, shuishui in a pink dress sitting tall in an open carriage with a brave smile, a small brown BEAR CUB and a small GREY bunny cheering behind her

pages.narration: 鳄鱼先生开火车，嘟嘟嘟嘟嘟嘟嘟，载着快乐轰隆隆隆隆！
pages.composition_hint: a three-quarter front medium view of the colorful small steam train rushing through sunny green hills and trees, a friendly cartoon GREEN CROCODILE train driver smiling in the engine, shuishui in a pink dress, a small brown BEAR CUB hugging a honey jar, and a small GREY bunny in blue overalls leaning out of open pastel carriages with joyful waving paws and clear happy faces

pages.narration: 小猴的尾巴，晃呀晃呀晃，香蕉挂在手臂上。看到鳄鱼先生点点头。
pages.composition_hint: an eye-level medium view at a small forest stop, a little brown MONKEY in a green shirt with a long curling tail and a bunch of yellow bananas hanging over its arm running toward the open pastel carriage, a friendly cartoon GREEN CROCODILE train driver nodding from the engine, shuishui in a pink dress waving from the carriage with a small brown BEAR CUB and a small GREY bunny visible beside her

pages.narration: 胖胖的小猪，哼哧哼哧跑，火车就要出发啦！

dialogue.speaker: piglet
dialogue.text: 鳄鱼先生，请你等一等，我还没有坐上火车呢！

pages.composition_hint: a three-quarter front wide view of the colorful small steam train slowing on the forest track, a chubby pink PIGLET in red shorts running and panting after the last open pastel carriage, a friendly cartoon GREEN CROCODILE train driver looking back kindly from the engine, shuishui in a pink dress and the small brown BEAR CUB, small GREY bunny, and little brown MONKEY watching with caring faces from the carriages

pages.narration: 小火车停一停，大家伸出手。慢一点也没关系，我们等你一起走。
pages.composition_hint: an eye-level close-up of the open pastel train carriage stopped beside the forest track, shuishui as a white rabbit in a pink dress reaching one paw to help a chubby pink PIGLET in red shorts step onto the carriage, a small brown BEAR CUB, a small GREY bunny, and a little brown MONKEY also reaching welcoming paws, a friendly cartoon GREEN CROCODILE train driver smiling gently from the engine in the background

pages.narration: 鳄鱼先生开火车，嘟嘟嘟嘟嘟嘟嘟！穿过森林，穿过山洞，勇敢向前冲，载着快乐轰隆隆隆隆！
pages.composition_hint: an eye-level wide view of the cute colorful small steam train traveling through bright green forest toward a rounded tunnel and distant gentle hills, a friendly cartoon GREEN CROCODILE train driver driving the round engine, shuishui in a pink dress, a small brown BEAR CUB with a honey jar, a small GREY bunny in blue overalls with a carrot backpack, a little brown MONKEY with bananas, and a chubby pink PIGLET in red shorts all riding together in open pastel carriages, smiling and singing
